ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spells" (
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spell */,
  "spell_name" TEXT /* Name of the spell */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the spell (1-5) */,
  "mana_cost" TEXT /* Mana cost of the spell */,
  "cooldown" TEXT /* Cooldown time of the spell */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the spell in meters */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of effect for the spell */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect description of the spell */,
  "spell_type" TEXT /* Type of spell (e.g., offensive, defensive, healing) */,
  "spell_level" TEXT /* Detailed level of the spell (e.g., 1.1, 1.2) */,
  "spell_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the spell */,
  "spell_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image URL for the spell */,
  "spell_sound" TEXT /* Sound effect URL for the spell */,
  "spell_animation" TEXT /* Animation URL for the spell */,
  "spell_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the spell effect in seconds */,
  "spell_target_count" INTEGER /* Number of targets the spell can affect */,
  "spell_requirement" TEXT /* Any specific requirements to use the spell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Class type of the character (e.g., Mage, Warrior) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "mana" INTEGER /* Mana points of the character */,
  "character_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image URL for the character */,
  "character_bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the character */,
  "character_race" TEXT /* Race of the character */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "character_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was created */,
  "character_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login for the character */,
  "character_experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "character_achievements" TEXT /* List of achievements earned by the character */,
  "character_total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total play time of the character in hours */,
  "character_faction" TEXT /* Faction or alliance of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_equipment" (
  "equip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment record */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who has equipped the spell */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell that is equipped */,
  "equip_date" TEXT /* Date when the spell was equipped */,
  "equip_status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "equip_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the spell is equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_equipment_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_equipment_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game designer, developer) */,
  "user_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image URL for the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the user */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login for the user */,
  "user_total_login_time" INTEGER /* Total login time for the user in hours */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom permissions are granted */,
  "can_create" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can create spells */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can edit spells */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can delete spells */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view spells */,
  "can_export" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can export data */,
  "can_import" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can import data */,
  "can_audit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can audit changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image URL for the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell mapped to a category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the spell belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES spell_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_category_mapping_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_usage_stats" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell used */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who used the spell */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the spell was used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the spell was last used */,
  "spell_usage_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of spell usage in seconds */,
  "spell_usage_success_rate" TEXT /* Success rate of the spell usage */,
  "spell_usage_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from players regarding the spell */,
  "spell_usage_balance_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the balance of the spell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_usage_stats_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_usage_stats_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cooldown_effects" (
  "cooldown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cooldown effect record */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell that has a cooldown */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the cooldown in seconds */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the effect during cooldown */,
  "cooldown_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image URL for the cooldown effect */,
  "cooldown_sound" TEXT /* Sound effect URL for the cooldown effect */,
  "cooldown_animation" TEXT /* Animation URL for the cooldown effect */,
  "cooldown_message" TEXT /* Message displayed during the cooldown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cooldown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cooldown_effects_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target record */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell that can target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., single target, area of effect) */,
  "target_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image URL for the target */,
  "target_sound" TEXT /* Sound effect URL for the target */,
  "target_animation" TEXT /* Animation URL for the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_targets_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect record */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell that has this effect */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., damage, heal) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the effect in seconds */,
  "effect_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image URL for the effect */,
  "effect_sound" TEXT /* Sound effect URL for the effect */,
  "effect_animation" TEXT /* Animation URL for the effect */,
  "effect_message" TEXT /* Message displayed when the effect is applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_effects_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)
